build_system: CMake 3.22 with vendored third-party libs (spdlog, nlohmann_json, doctest, sqlite3)
test_framework: doctest with single test_main.cpp defining DOCTEST_CONFIG_IMPLEMENT_WITH_MAIN; tests in tests/<module>/test_*.cpp
verification_instructions: 1. cmake -B build -DENABLE_QT=OFF, 2. cmake --build build (must compile clean), 3. cd build && ctest --output-on-failure (all tests pass)
setup_instructions: Already built and tested. Baseline passes.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - no external downloads. GCC 11.5/Clang 15, CMake 3.22 pre-installed. Third-party libs vendored in third_party/ (spdlog, nlohmann_json, doctest, sqlite3_stub).
contribution_requirements: C++20 standard, static libraries, modules follow include/src layout, tests in tests/ using doctest
key_patterns: Each module: add_library(threatone_<name> STATIC ...), PUBLIC include dir, link to threatone_compiler_options + threatone_core. Interfaces in I*.h, implementations in *.h/*.cpp. Tests use TEST_CASE/SUBCASE/CHECK/REQUIRE macros. ModuleLogger from core/Logger.h for logging. Namespaces: ThreatOne::<Module>.
directory_structure: Root: CMakeLists.txt, cmake/ (CompilerOptions/Version/Dependencies), src/ (30+ modules each with CMakeLists.txt + include/ + src/), tests/ (test_main.cpp + per-module dirs), third_party/ (doctest/nlohmann/spdlog/sqlite), qml/ (Qt UI)
